reasoning: The primary anchor is 0.52, based on the historical trend analysis provided. We are comparing the Moody's Baa Corporate Bond Yield on 2026-04-05 against 2026-03-29. Therefore, the latest value by April 5 will be from Thursday, April 2, and the baseline value for March 29 is Friday, March 27 (which is 6.22). With only four trading days separating the two values, the movement will heavily rely on short-term market noise. The recent trend has been upward (climbing from 6.09 to 6.22 over the past 3 days), so while a local peak suggests some mean reversion, the upward momentum balances this out. Setting the probability accurately close to fifty-fifty at 0.52.
